assertions.text: The agent recognizes this as a request to upgrade the vendored open-cowork stack.
The agent performs a fast-forward-only git pull of the open-cowork vendor.
The slash command invokes the open-cowork upgrade workflow.
The agent uses a fast-forward-only pull and reports the result.
The agent updates the vendored open-cowork stack via a fast-forward-only pull.
The agent reports the upgraded open-cowork state.
